nasb.text: In the twelfth year of Ahaz king of Judah, Hoshea the son of Elah became king over Israel in Samaria, and reigned nine years.

esv.text: In the twelfth year of Ahaz king of Judah, Hoshea the son of Elah began to reign in Samaria over Israel, and he reigned nine years.

cnv.text: 猶大王亞哈斯在位第十二年，以拉的兒子何細亞在撒瑪利亞登基，統治以色列九年。

ccb.text: 犹大王亚哈斯执政第十二年，以拉的儿子何细亚在撒玛利亚登基做以色列王，执政九年。
